S

setAddress(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the street address of the license holder.
setCity(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the city of the license holder.
setDateOfBirth(LocalDate) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the date of birth of the license holder.
setDateOfIssue(LocalDate) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the date of issue of the license.
setExpiryDate(LocalDate) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the expiry date of the license.
setFirstName(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the first name of the license holder.
setHeight(int) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the height of the license holder in centimeters.
setLastName(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the last name of the license holder.
setLicenseClass(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the class of the driver's license.
setLicenseNumber(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the license number.
setPostalCode(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the postal code of the license holder.
setProvince(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the province of the license holder.
setReferenceNumber(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the document reference number.
setRestrictions(String) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets any restrictions on the license.
setSex(char) - Method in class assignment1.DriversLicense
Sets the sex of the license holder.
